name: Baileys Engine
description: Pure WebSocket WhatsApp engine via @whiskeysockets/baileys. No browser, no Chromium. Recommended for containerised / serverless / free-tier hosts.
author: OpenWA Team

authDir.title: Auth State Directory
authDir.description: Directory to persist Baileys credentials (creds.json). Defaults to the session data path.

printQR.title: Print QR in Terminal
printQR.description: Print QR code to container logs (for debug / first-time pairing via SSH).
